description: Approval task timeline for a given leave request process instance. Consumed by the wd_leave_request_detail page sub-table.
fromSql: SELECT t.pid AS pid, t.chain_node_id AS "nodeId", t.task_title AS "taskName", t.actual_approver_id AS assignee, t.status AS status, (t.approval_data->>'taskResult') AS result, t.approval_comment AS comment, t.created_at AS "startedAt", t.completed_at AS "completedAt" FROM ab_approval_task t WHERE t.tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND t.chain_execution_id = #{params.processInstanceId} ORDER BY t.created_at ASC
